stories.title: Austrian GP Qualifying — Norris Takes Pole, Verstappen Stranded at P7

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: POLE POSITION. Lando Norris takes Austrian GP pole 0.521 seconds ahead of Leclerc. McLaren converts practice chaos into qualifying pace. Championship leader Antonelli falls back after dominating FP1 and FP2. What a Saturday at Red Bull Ring. #AustrianGP #F1Fanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Max Verstappen qualifies P7 at his OWN circuit. At a track where he's won SIX times. Exit clause countdown is ticking. Red Bull's biggest upgrade failed to produce the front row they desperately needed. #AustrianGP #F1Fanrecap

article.headline: Austrian GP Qualifying: Norris Storms to Pole as Verstappen Struggles to P7 at His Home Race

stories.title: Ferrari's Austrian Engine Debut — Hamilton Eyes Another Win to Close 41-Point Gap

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text: Ferrari debuts their new ICE engine upgrade at Austria — worth ~8 hp and ~0.1s/lap. Leclerc starts P2. Hamilton is 41 points back of Antonelli with 15 races left. Austria could be the moment Ferrari changes the title conversation. #AustrianGP #F1Fanrecap

article.headline: Ferrari's Austrian Engine Debut: Seven Horsepower, Forty-One Points, and Hamilton's Title Bid

stories.title: Verstappen's Home Race Nightmare — P7 Start and the Exit Clock Ticking

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Six Austrian GP wins. Starts P7. Red Bull's biggest upgrade brought to his home race — and it didn't deliver. Verstappen's exit clause triggers at summer break. The Hungarian GP (July 26) is his last chance to avoid activating it. #Verstappen #F1Fanrecap

article.headline: Verstappen Qualifies P7 at His Own Home Race — and the Exit Countdown Is Running Out of Time

stories.title: Cadillac's 10-Part Upgrade Goes Up in Smoke — Literally

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Cadillac brought their 10-part 2026 upgrade to Austria. Perez had electrical failures causing a red flag AND a VSC. Bottas had a fire under his cockpit. Zero components properly evaluated. Zero points. Zero luck. #AustrianGP #F1Fanrecap

article.headline: Cadillac's Ten-Part Upgrade Arrives in Austria — and Goes Up in Smoke

stories.title: Austrian GP Race Preview — Five Storylines That Will Define Sunday

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Austrian GP preview: Norris leads from pole but McLaren's race pace is a question. Leclerc P2, Ferrari's new engine on board. Verstappen starts P7 at his home circuit. Antonelli needs to charge through. 71 laps. Championship on the line. #AustrianGP #F1Fanrecap
